stemHtml:
Refer to figure or GSPRM Jeppesen Chart E(LO)2. 
A flight is planned along route T420, course 330°, FL360, inbound TRENT VOR/DME (TNT, N 53.1° W 1.7°). A descent should be initiated to pass waypoint ELVOS at FL200. Calculate the Top of Descent (TOD) relating to TRENT, given the following information:

ROD: 2300 ft/min 
GS: 345 kt
Wind component: 35 kt tailwind
